regulatory_requirement: No clinical data required for well-established technology if equivalence demonstrated
decision_logic_candidate: IF WET AND equivalence THEN reduced_evidence
route_impact: Enables WET route with minimal clinical data
source_quote_or_anchor: Well-established technologies are exempt from clinical investigation if equivalence demonstrated

regulatory_requirement: Data from pre-MDR certified devices may be acceptable with justification
decision_logic_candidate: IF legacy AND pre-market data THEN acceptable with gap analysis
route_impact: Enables legacy route with gap closure
clinical_investigation_impact: CI may be needed for gaps
writer_constraint_candidate: Must document legacy data lineage and gap
NB_explanation_candidate: Explain legacy data validity and transition
source_quote_or_anchor: Clinical data from devices previously certified under Directives may be acceptable

regulatory_requirement: Technical, biological, and clinical equivalence must be demonstrated for all three dimensions
decision_logic_candidate: IF all_3_dim_equivalent THEN equivalence_route ELSE non_equivalence_path
evidence_burden_impact: Low if equivalence proven; high if not
clinical_investigation_impact: No CI if full equivalence; CI if partial
source_quote_or_anchor: The demonstration of equivalence must cover technical, biological and clinical characteristics

regulatory_requirement: Clinical evaluation shall be based on clinical data from clinical investigations or other studies
decision_logic_candidate: IF no equivalence AND not WET THEN own clinical data required
writer_constraint_candidate: Must present own clinical data as primary evidence
NB_explanation_candidate: Explain clinical investigation design and results
source_quote_or_anchor: Clinical evaluation shall be based on clinical data providing sufficient clinical evidence

regulatory_requirement: Published literature alone may be sufficient for certain device types with established technology
decision_logic_candidate: IF literature-sufficient device AND no novel claims THEN literature-primary acceptable
route_impact: Enables literature-only route for low-risk established devices
NB_explanation_candidate: Explain why literature alone is sufficient
source_quote_or_anchor: Published literature alone may provide sufficient clinical evidence for well-established devices

regulatory_requirement: PMCF shall address gaps in clinical evidence identified during clinical evaluation
decision_logic_candidate: IF evidence_gap THEN PMCF_plan AND limitation_statement
PMCF_impact: Critical - must be proportionate to gap
clinical_investigation_impact: CI may be required if PMCF insufficient
writer_constraint_candidate: Must clearly state limitations and PMCF plan
NB_explanation_candidate: Explain gap rationale and PMCF adequacy
source_quote_or_anchor: Post-market clinical follow-up shall address any gaps in the clinical evidence

regulatory_requirement: Level of clinical evidence shall be proportionate to device risk and novelty
decision_logic_candidate: IF high_risk OR high_novelty THEN high_evidence_burden
clinical_investigation_impact: Higher risk = more likely CI needed
writer_constraint_candidate: Must align evidence volume with risk class
NB_explanation_candidate: Justify evidence level against risk profile
source_quote_or_anchor: The level of clinical evidence shall be appropriate to the characteristics of the device and its intended purpose

regulatory_requirement: Literature must be relevant, of sufficient quality, and weighted appropriately
decision_logic_candidate: IF relevant AND quality_sufficient THEN usable ELSE excluded
source_quote_or_anchor: Published literature must be identified, appraised and analysed in a systematic manner

regulatory_requirement: Clinical data from equivalent device may support subject device if 3-dim equivalence proven
decision_logic_candidate: IF equivalent AND data_access_statement THEN usable_for_support
NB_explanation_candidate: Explain equivalent evidence usage with limitations
source_quote_or_anchor: Clinical data from an equivalent device may be used to demonstrate conformity

regulatory_requirement: GSPR 1-3 require clinical evidence for performance, safety, and benefit-risk
clinical_investigation_impact: CI may be needed for GSPR demonstration
writer_constraint_candidate: Must map claims to GSPR clauses
source_quote_or_anchor: Devices shall achieve the performance intended and be designed to ensure safety and benefit-risk acceptability

regulatory_requirement: PMCF required for all devices; enhanced for high-risk and innovative devices
decision_logic_candidate: IF Class_III OR implantable OR innovation THEN enhanced_PMCF
source_quote_or_anchor: Post-market clinical follow-up shall be conducted for all devices

regulatory_requirement: Clinical investigation required unless justified by existing data or WET/equivalence
decision_logic_candidate: IF NOT(WET OR equivalence OR sufficient_literature) THEN CI_required
source_quote_or_anchor: Clinical investigations shall be conducted unless sufficient clinical evidence exists

regulatory_requirement: NB assesses strategy, evidence sufficiency, GSPR compliance, and risk management
NB_explanation_candidate: Explain rationale for all key decisions
source_quote_or_anchor: NB assessment covers clinical evaluation strategy, evidence, and conclusions

regulatory_requirement: SOTA must demonstrate awareness of current accepted practice and available alternatives
decision_logic_candidate: SOTA informs benchmark and claim justification
writer_constraint_candidate: Must describe current practice and alternatives
source_quote_or_anchor: State of the art includes current accepted practice and available alternatives
